allow: PowerShell($p='c:\\Users\\gigabyte\\Documents\\GitHub\\L-Dev31.github.io\\projects\\WebAnalytics\\engine.js'; $s=[IO.File]::ReadAllText\($p\); $lines=$s -split "`n"; for\($i=0;$i -lt $lines.Length;$i++\){ if\($lines[$i] -match 'normalize\\\(.NFD.\\\)'\){ Write-Output \("L{0}: {1}" -f \($i+1\), $lines[$i]\); $bytes=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($lines[$i]\); Write-Output \("  bytes \(hex chunk around replace\): " + \(\($bytes | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\('X2'\) }\) -join '' | Select-String -Pattern '5B[0-9A-F]{2,16}5D2C'\).Matches.Value\) } })

PowerShell($p='c:\\Users\\gigabyte\\Documents\\GitHub\\L-Dev31.github.io\\projects\\WebAnalytics\\engine.js'; $bytes=[IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($p\); $needle=[byte[]]\(0x5B,0xCC,0x80,0x2D,0xCD,0xAF,0x5D\); $replacement=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\('[̀-ͯ]'\); $out=New-Object 'System.Collections.Generic.List[byte]'; $i=0; $count=0; while\($i -lt $bytes.Length\){ $match=$true; if\($i+$needle.Length -le $bytes.Length\){ for\($j=0;$j -lt $needle.Length;$j++\){ if\($bytes[$i+$j] -ne $needle[$j]\){$match=$false;break} } } else { $match=$false }; if\($match\){ $out.AddRange\($replacement\); $i+=$needle.Length; $count++ } else { $out.Add\($bytes[$i]\); $i++ } }; [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($p,$out.ToArray\(\)\); Write-Output "Replaced $count occurrence\(s\)")

PowerShell($p='c:\\Users\\gigabyte\\Documents\\GitHub\\L-Dev31.github.io\\projects\\WebAnalytics\\engine.js'; $bytes=[IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($p\); $needle=[byte[]]\(0x5B,0xCC,0x80,0x2D,0xCD,0xAF,0x5D\); $replacement=[Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes\('[̀-ͯ]'\); $out=New-Object 'System.Collections.Generic.List[byte]'; $i=0; $count=0; while\($i -lt $bytes.Length\){ $match=$true; if\($i+$needle.Length -le $bytes.Length\){ for\($j=0;$j -lt $needle.Length;$j++\){ if\($bytes[$i+$j] -ne $needle[$j]\){$match=$false;break} } } else { $match=$false }; if\($match\){ $out.AddRange\($replacement\); $i+=$needle.Length; $count++ } else { $out.Add\($bytes[$i]\); $i++ } }; [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($p,$out.ToArray\(\)\); Write-Output "Replaced $count occurrence\(s\)")

PowerShell($p='c:\\Users\\gigabyte\\Documents\\GitHub\\L-Dev31.github.io\\projects\\WebAnalytics\\engine.js'; $bytes=[IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($p\); $needle=[byte[]]\(0x5B,0x3F,0x2D,0x3F,0x5D\); $replacement=[Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes\('[̀-ͯ]'\); $out=New-Object 'System.Collections.Generic.List[byte]'; $i=0; $count=0; while\($i -lt $bytes.Length\){ $match=$true; if\($i+$needle.Length -le $bytes.Length\){ for\($j=0;$j -lt $needle.Length;$j++\){ if\($bytes[$i+$j] -ne $needle[$j]\){$match=$false;break} } } else { $match=$false }; if\($match\){ $out.AddRange\($replacement\); $i+=$needle.Length; $count++ } else { $out.Add\($bytes[$i]\); $i++ } }; [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($p,$out.ToArray\(\)\); Write-Output "Replaced $count occurrence\(s\)")

PowerShell($p='c:\\Users\\gigabyte\\Documents\\GitHub\\L-Dev31.github.io\\projects\\WebAnalytics\\engine.js'; $bytes=[IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($p\); $needle=[byte[]]\(0x5B,0xCC,0x80,0x2D,0xCD,0xAF,0x5D\); $found=0; for\($i=0;$i -lt \($bytes.Length-$needle.Length\);$i++\){ $m=$true; for\($j=0;$j -lt $needle.Length;$j++\){ if\($bytes[$i+$j] -ne $needle[$j]\){$m=$false;break} }; if\($m\){$found++} }; Write-Output "literal combining-mark byte sequence count: $found")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('./src/markup.js'\).then\(m=>{const cases=['~~Sessions. Il y a **gras dedans**.~~','**Trop propre.** ~~aside~~ normal','##cest moi##','simple','~~~triple~~~'];for\(const c of cases\){const t=m.tokeniseMarkup\(c\);console.log\('IN:',JSON.stringify\(c\)\);console.log\('OUT:',m.renderFromTokens\(t\)\);console.log\('PARTIAL:',m.renderFromTokens\(t,5\)\);console.log\('---'\);}}\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const f='c:/Users/gigabyte/Documents/GitHub/L-Dev31.github.io/projects/WebAnalytics/data/dialogue/marine.json'; let s=fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\); if\(s.charCodeAt\(0\)===0xFEFF\) s=s.slice\(1\); try { JSON.parse\(s\); console.log\('marine ok'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('marine ERR:', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "for \(const f of ['data/locations.json','data/connections.json','data/flags.json','data/dialogue/intro.json','data/dialogue/marine.json','data/dialogue/pascal.json','data/dialogue/data.json','data/dialogue/jia.json','data/dialogue/_acte1_outro.json']\) { try { JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\)\); console.log\('OK', f\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('FAIL', f, e.message\); } }")
